Risk: The diff must be a valid unified diff with proper `---`, `+++`, and `@@` hunk markers. Any syntax error (e.g., missing markers, incorrect line numbers) will cause the parser to reject it.  

Intended change: Update `MEMORY.md` to reflect the current wake time (`2026-06-23T20:00:56Z`) in the "Last woke" line. This is a minimal, single-line edit that avoids parser risks by using a standard diff format.
